#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace TestDomain;

/// <summary>
/// Triggers data fetch for <see cref="OrderProjection"/>.
/// </summary>
/// <param name="CorrelationId">Trace identifier shared by all actions in this load cycle.</param>
public record OrderProjectionLoadRequestedAction(string CorrelationId);

/// <summary>
/// Data arrived for <see cref="OrderProjection"/>.
/// </summary>
/// <param name="CorrelationId">Trace identifier shared with the originating <see cref="OrderProjectionLoadRequestedAction"/>.</param>
/// <param name="Items">The loaded projection items.</param>
public record OrderProjectionLoadedAction(string CorrelationId, IReadOnlyList<OrderProjection> Items);

/// <summary>
/// Data fetch failed for <see cref="OrderProjection"/>.
/// </summary>
/// <param name="CorrelationId">Trace identifier shared with the originating <see cref="OrderProjectionLoadRequestedAction"/>.</param>
/// <param name="Error">The failure reason.</param>
public record OrderProjectionLoadFailedAction(string CorrelationId, string Error);
